title: 2026-07-20｜Daily English

reviewQuiz.zh: 清晰披露所有额外费用
reviewQuiz.answer: provide clear disclosure of all additional charges

reviewQuiz.zh: 为首屏之外的图片启用懒加载
reviewQuiz.answer: enable lazy loading for off-screen images

reviewQuiz.zh: 确认离境税是否已包含
reviewQuiz.answer: check whether the departure tax is included

reviewQuiz.zh: 查看旅行保险的保障范围

words.meaning: 验证；核验信息是否真实、完整或符合要求
words.sentence: The flow should show a clear error message when booking verification fails.

words.meaning: 撤销；冲正；将已完成的交易或操作恢复
words.sentence: The system creates a payment reversal when the original charge cannot be completed.

words.meaning: 合规；遵守规则、政策或监管要求
words.sentence: The consent step was added to meet a compliance requirement.

words.meaning: 事件传播；事件在 DOM 捕获和冒泡阶段中的传递过程
words.sentence: Stop event propagation when clicking the nested button should not trigger the card action.

words.meaning: 陈旧闭包；闭包读取了旧状态或旧变量值
words.sentence: Use the latest state reference to avoid a stale closure in the callback.

words.meaning: 骨架屏；数据加载完成前展示的占位界面
words.sentence: Display a skeleton screen while the product list is loading.

words.meaning: 背景信息；理解问题或决定所需的上下文
words.sentence: Please provide more context so we can evaluate the impact of the change.

words.meaning: 承诺；明确答应完成的事项或时间
words.sentence: We should confirm the dependency before making a delivery commitment.

words.meaning: 行李额度；机票允许携带或托运的行李数量和重量
words.sentence: Check the baggage allowance before adding an extra suitcase.

words.meaning: 货币兑换；将一种货币换成另一种货币
words.sentence: Compare the currency exchange rate before paying in the local currency.

focus: 动态复习：继续区分 disclosure / authorization / compliance，分别对应信息披露、操作批准和规则合规。
技术强化：将 batching / lazy loading / optimistic update 与 event propagation / stale closure / skeleton screen 分类练习，重点说明每个概念解决什么问题。
沟通表达：用 accountability / clarification / context / commitment 组织一次简短同步，先补充背景，再澄清问题，最后确认责任和承诺。
旅行复习：把 departure tax / travel insurance / baggage allowance / currency exchange 串成出发前检查清单。
